claim: Cursor is model-agnostic and works with multiple LLM backends including Claude, GPT, and Gemini
actionable: Use Cursor with your preferred LLM by selecting it in the model configuration

claim: Cursor automations enable workflow building with natural language specifications
actionable: Create /automations in Cursor to define triggers, tools, and instructions for recurring workflows

claim: MCP connectors allow integrating tools without requiring API keys or manual setup
actionable: Use MCP connectors in Cursor to integrate tools like Slack, GitHub, and third-party APIs
